entries.content:
Shatadal Sundar Sinha
SENIOR FRONT-END DEVELOPER • REACT.JS • NEXT.JS • ANGULAR • TYPESCRIPT •
NODE.JS • AI AGENTS
Email: shatadal17@gmail.com Phone: +91 70636 44658, +91 93824 68250 Location: Kolkata, West Bengal,
India
Personal AI Agent: shatadalpersonalassistent.vercel.app — built & deployed by me; ask it anything about my
background
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior Front-End Developer with 4+ years of experience building high-performance web applications across
SaaS, EdTech, and PropTech domains. Specialises in React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript on the front end, with
additional experience in Angular for component-driven UI development. Hands-on backend experience in
Node.js, EJS templating, and MongoDB, with a growing focus on building and deploying personal AI agents.
Proven track record in leading product development, integrating payment gateways, designing REST APIs,
and leveraging AI-assisted workflows, consistently delivering clean, scalable solutions in cross-functional
teams.
WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Front-End Developer Aug 2024 – Present
Webskitters Technology Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
WebSkitters Academy – Student CRM Portal (In-house Product Front-End Lead)
• Led front-end development from scratch, owning architecture and delivery across the full product lifecycle.
• Built a scalable component system using Next.js, TypeScript, and Material UI actively serving hundreds of
students and admins.
• Converted Figma wireframes into pixel-perfect, fully responsive pages with zero design debt.
• Collaborated with back-end engineers on REST API integration, defining consistent data-flow and error-
handling patterns.
• Integrated Razorpay, Cashfree, and Instamojo payment gateways for real-time fee collection with
automated confirmation workflows.
• Achieved sub-2s LCP on key pages, directly improving user retention metrics.
Qpulse AI-Powered Resume Builder (Client Project USA)
• Built an AI-driven resume builder and admin dashboard using Next.js and TypeScript with multiple AI model
backends.
• Developed personalised career roadmap features and a real-time AI chatbot for end-to-end interactive
experience.
• Assisted in lightweight backend tasks — built and consumed Node.js REST APIs for data persistence and
user session management.
• Leveraged AI coding assistants (Claude AI, Amazon Q, GLM AI) to accelerate feature delivery and
streamline code reviews.
Personal AI Agent — Shatadal Personal Assistant (Self-Initiated Project)
• Designed and deployed a personal conversational AI agent that answers questions about my background,
skills, and experience on my behalf, available at shatadalpersonalassistent.vercel.app.
• Built end-to-end as a light full-stack project, handling both the front-end interface and the backend/agent
logic.
Page 1 of 3

-- 1 of 3 --

• Applied AI-assisted development practices to design, build, and deploy the agent independently, reflecting
growing full-stack and AI-agent capability.
Front-End Developer Jun 2023 – Aug 2024
Ebrotech Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
Tenant Management System
• Designed and built the full UI for a web and mobile rent management app — tenant records, rent tracking,
and landlord dashboards using React.js and Ant Design.
• Integrated MongoDB-backed REST APIs for real-time data sync; maintained 99% uptime through thorough
end-to-end testing.
Visitor Management Platform
• Built a type-safe visitor scheduling system with React.js and TypeScript; strict typing and validation reduced
runtime bugs by ~40%.
• Contributed to lightweight backend routes using Node.js and EJS for server-side rendered admin views.
Entra Office App
• Built a feature-rich office management application covering meeting room bookings, visitor tracking, staff
management, and expense reporting.
• Worked on select Angular-based modules for internal dashboard views, gaining hands-on experience with
Angular components and services.
Front-End Developer Jul 2022 – May 2023
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
• Doctor Appointment System: Delivered a responsive doctor availability and booking platform using
React.js, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS.
• School Management System: Contributed to a centralised school operations platform using HTML5,
CSS3, and JavaScript, with Node.js + MongoDB powering the backend.
Front-End Developer Intern Sep 2021 – Feb 2022
Brenolabs Pvt. Ltd. Kolkata, India
• Built the front-end of a full-featured e-commerce platform - product listings, shopping cart, authentication,
and payment integration using React.js, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap.
• Gained initial exposure to Node.js/Express backend patterns and MongoDB data modelling during the
project.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Front-End React.js, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5,
CSS3
Back-End Node.js, Express.js, EJS, REST API Design & Integration
AI Agents & Tooling Built and deployed a personal conversational AI agent (live demo:
shatadalpersonalassistent.vercel.app); comfortable working as a light
full-stack developer using AI-assisted tooling
Database MongoDB, Mongoose
State Management Redux, Context API, React Query
UI Libraries Material UI (MUI), Ant Design, Tailwind CSS, SCSS/SASS, Bootstrap
Page 2 of 3

-- 2 of 3 --

Payment Gateways Razorpay, Cashfree, Instamojo
Tools & Workflow Git/GitHub, VS Code, Figma, Performance Optimisation, Agile / Scrum
AI Dev Tools Claude AI, Amazon Q, GLM AI, Antigravity AI
Soft Skills Front-End Leadership, Cross-functional Collaboration, Clean Code
Practices
EDUCATION
B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering 2018 – 2022
Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT) CGPA: 8.57/10
Page 3 of 3

-- 3 of 3 --
